name: Australian Aboriginal Flag

colors.symbolism: the red earth, ochre and the spiritual relationship with the land
the sun, giver and protector of life

description: Two horizontal stripes — black on top, red on bottom — with a yellow disc centred on the join.
history: Designed by Luritja artist Harold Thomas and first flown on National Aborigines Day in Adelaide on 12 July 1971. Officially proclaimed a Flag of Australia under the Flags Act 1953 on 14 July 1995.

features.symbolism: black for the Aboriginal people; red for the earth and their spiritual connection to it
the sun, the giver of life and protector
